## Checks

- [ ] `pnpm build && pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm format:check` pass
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] Conventional Commit messages
- [ ] If a published number changed, the golden scorecard test and the README are updated
- [ ] If a public `@ashborn-sec/core` type changed, it was intentional
